articles.author: Takahiro Sato
articles.description:
Managing separate AI rule files for different systems? mq can generate them from one master file.


  
  
  The Problem

Each AI system needs its own rule file. Managing multiple separate Markdown files gets messy quickly.

  
  
  Simple Solution

Keep all AI rules in one master file, then generate individual files:


$ mq 'nodes | sections(2) | filter(fn(section): let head = first(section) | contains(head, "Claude Rules");) | first() | map(decrease_header_level) | to_markdown_string()' master-
